description: Concurrency and State Risk: Detect race conditions, improper async usage, and shared state hazards.

fixtures.notes: Calls asyncMethod().Result in an async context, which can cause a deadlock on ASP.NET synchronization contexts.
Modifies a static Dictionary<string,int> counter from multiple code paths without any locking or atomic operations.
Properly uses await for all async calls with no blocking .Result or .Wait() — no concurrency issue.
Uses ConcurrentDictionary and Interlocked.Increment for the shared counter — thread-safe implementation.
Uses lock() correctly but holds the lock while making an outbound HTTP call, risking contention and deadlock.
